title: I Always Said Yes: The Many Lives of Wakefield Poole
original_title: I Always Said Yes: The Many Lives of Wakefield Poole
overview: I Always Said Yes is a portrait of pioneering filmmaker Wakefield Poole, whose careers as dancer, choreographer, and director spanned the golden years of Broadway, television, porno chic, and gay liberation.
